entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cultivated crop Cicer arietinum L. characterized by narrow genetic and phenotypic diversity

entities.name: C. RETICULATUM
entities.description: Wild accession of chickpea assessed for drought adaptation traits

entities.name: C. ECHINOSPERMUM
entities.description: Wild accession of chickpea assessed for drought adaptation traits

entities.name: GENETIC AND PHENOTYPIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The range of genetic and physical variation within a crop species

entities.name: DROUGHT ADAPTATION TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics that enable plants to withstand water-limited conditions

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION RATE
entities.description: The rate of water loss from plant leaves, used as an indicator of drought adaptation

entities.name: VAPOR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the amount of moisture in the air and how much moisture the air can hold when saturated

entities.name: SOIL DRYING
entities.description: The reduction of water content in the soil

entities.name: DICLE UNIVERSITY GLASSHOUSE
entities.description: The facility where the transpiration experiments were conducted

entities.name: COMPLETE RANDOMISED BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental layout used for the study with six replications

entities.name: VEGETATIVE GROWTH
entities.description: The stage of plant development focused on the growth of leaves and stems

entities.name: GRAVIMETRIC MEASUREMENT
entities.description: The process of weighing potted plants at regular intervals to determine water loss

entities.name: TOTAL LEAF AREA
entities.description: The total surface area of the leaves measured destructively

entities.name: SHOOT DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The dry mass of the plant's above-ground parts

entities.name: ROOT DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The dry mass of the plant's below-ground parts

entities.name: LEAF DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The dry mass of the plant's leaves

entities.name: SIRNAK
entities.description: A wild genotype of chickpea exhibiting extreme transpiration rate values

entities.name: DESTE
entities.description: A wild genotype of chickpea exhibiting extreme transpiration rate values

entities.name: DRY ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments characterized by low water availability and high evaporative demand

entities.name: HARSH CLIMATES
entities.description: Climates with extreme environmental stressors affecting crop performance
